name: New React component
description: Add a React component that matches the project's existing conventions.
rules: Match the surrounding code's style — naming, file layout, and styling approach.
Reuse existing design tokens/variables instead of hardcoding colors or spacing.
Keep components focused; lift shared state to the nearest sensible parent.
steps: Find a similar existing component and mirror its structure.
Create the component with typed props.
Wire it into its parent or route.
Verify it renders in both light and dark themes if the app supports them.
author: lectern
